Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Oh, look, a yukata! Hm, maybe I should've worn one too...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Don't you think I'd look good in one?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I guess yukatas really are a must for summer festivals then![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Although, they are kinda stuffy and hard to move in. They're more inconvenient than most people might think.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}The last time I wore one was when I was just a child. I remember taking it off right away because it was just too hot.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Wouldn't a yukata be better since it's the summer festival though?[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 106 0 25 25}Although, they are kinda stuffy and hard to move in. They're more inconvenient than most people might think.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}The last time I wore one was when I was just a child. I remember taking it off right away because it was just too hot.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Let's eat some takoyaki! I'll split it with you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}One order of takoyaki, please![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 106 0 25 25}Wait, this takoyaki... Is there no octopus in it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}That's for you to eat and find out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Hang on a sec. I'll make one for you now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Just don't try to peek at what I'm putting inside![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}...Here you go, one order of takoyaki![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}But there's something really tough and chewy in the middle...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Look at all the different masks![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}My parents used to buy them for me when I was little. I always got the ones from that superhero TV show.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Oh look! They still have the same ones as back then! This really brings me back...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Hey, you two! Wanna try your hand at a lucky draw?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Make some nice memories, whaddaya say? Odds are lookin' good—lots of winning tickets left![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}That sounds fun, doesn't it? Let's give it a try. I am a sucker for games like this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The box is filled with[n]triangular lottery tickets...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Congratulations, you won![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Wow, you must have incredible luck to win on your first try![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Here is your prize. Enjoy![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I received the item (ITEM NAME).[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Congratulations, you won![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Wow, you must have incredible luck to win on your first try![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I received the item (ITEM NAME).[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}That looks pretty expensive. You picked a good ticket![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}But didn't that guy seem a little upset about it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}Oh, look at the time. We should start heading back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}Thanks, {f 4 1}-kun. I had a great time today![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}Let's go to more fun events like this in the future![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After seeing Yuko home, I[n]decided to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
